title: Enterprise internal dataset placeholder

title: Public literature candidate registry
applicability: R13 metadata only list for future literature and standards candidates
limitation: No web crawling or file download in R13

title: Crossref REST API metadata
applicability: DOI metadata discovery for sheet metal forming stamping material and CAE literature; R21 public API rows=3 sample
limitation: Metadata only; public REST API sampled once without DOI landing page or full text followup; repeated polite-pool use needs a project contact email

title: arXiv API metadata
applicability: Preprint metadata discovery for RAG and materials modeling methods
limitation: Metadata only; respect one request per three seconds and single connection; R21 API retry returned HTTP 429 so no new arXiv metadata sample was collected

title: Zenodo records metadata
applicability: Dataset metadata discovery for candidate materials process and simulation records
limitation: Metadata may be reusable under CC0 per Zenodo terms, but robots and API returned 403 in this environment again; no R21 Zenodo sample retained

title: NIST Materials Data Repository
applicability: Materials and simulation tool metadata discovery for candidate material process and simulation records; R21 OAI GetRecord sample count=3
limitation: Metadata only; DSpace JSON API returned empty responses and OAI ListRecords response was too large to retain; no data files or landing pages downloaded

title: AutoForm public website metadata
applicability: Official AutoForm public page metadata for product terminology, forming solver and BiW assembly process-chain catalog candidates; R21 page metadata sample count=3
limitation: Metadata only; no page body, fileadmin assets, PDFs, manuals, screenshots, sitemap expansion or product documentation scraping; legal scope and owner review required

title: NIST Public Data Repository metadata
applicability: Public manufacturing system process planning quality inspection and additive manufacturing metadata candidates; R23 selected records=10
limitation: Metadata only; data files landing pages PDFs source files formal index writes and engineering execution are not allowed before item scope and owner review

title: Partner enterprise manual submission gate
applicability: R22 partner enterprise process content intake metadata envelopes only
limitation: No partner confidential body file material curve CAD drawing or historical report enters formal index until agreement owner confidentiality withdrawal and engineering scope are confirmed
